title: AON's PEP Achieves $2Bn Milestone in U.S. Assets & Commitments
text: AON's PEP currently serves more than 70 employers from different industries. It provides benefits in the form of increased retirement savings for employees.

title: Can Erie Indemnity (ERIE) Run Higher on Rising Earnings Estimates?
text: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) shares have started gaining and might continue moving higher in the near term, as indicated by solid earnings estimate revisions.

title: 5 Stocks to Buy From the Prospering Insurance Brokerage Industry
text: Increased demand for insurance products, given an aging population, baby boomers and millennials, and the adoption of technology should drive insurance brokers like MMC, AON, AJG, BRO, and ERIE.

title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) Upgraded to Strong Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
text: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).
